description: Minimal CLI command registry draft. This is design data only; commands are not implemented yet.

commands.name: check action
commands.purpose: Check an action descriptor against policy before any adapter execution.

commands.name: check text
commands.purpose: Scan text, stdin, or a file for configured secret patterns.

commands.name: check path
commands.purpose: Check path ownership, read-only rules, and operation risk.

commands.name: task status
commands.purpose: Read a task snapshot from task ledger files.

commands.name: task events
commands.purpose: Read task event history from event ledger files.

commands.name: agents list
commands.purpose: List agents from the agent registry.

commands.name: adapters list
commands.purpose: List adapters from the adapter registry.

commands.name: policies list
commands.purpose: List policy files and rule counts.

commands.name: doctor
commands.purpose: Validate project structure, JSON, JSONL, schema compatibility, and public-scan rules.
